name: Caramel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring brown sugar and butter to a boil.
2. Thin out with hot water until the mixture is smooth.
3. Mix cornstarch, vanilla, and egg yolks with a little water in a separate bowl.
4. Add this mixture to the hot caramel mixture, stirring until thickened.
5. Cool the mixture before pouring it into a baked pie shell.
6. Make meringue and place on top of the filling.
7. Brown in an oven set to 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
